title: Dazzling Blue & Green Dinosaur Loot Bags (19cm x 28cm) - Fun & Colorful Party Favor Bags - Perfect for Kids Parties & Events - 8ct
features: VIBRANT BLUE & GREEN DESIGN: Add a splash of color to your child's party with our dazzling blue & green dinosaur loot bags (19cm x 28cm) - the perfect addition to any dinosaur-themed celebration or event.

STURDY & DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from high-quality, durable material, these loot bags are designed to hold party favors, goodies, treats, and gifts with ease, while ensuring they remain in place during your event.
PERFECT FOR KIDS PARTIES & EVENTS: Ideal for birthdays, school events, playdates, and more, our dazzling blue & green dinosaur loot bags are sure to be a hit with kids and parents alike.

REUSABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY: Our dinosaur loot bags are not only fun and colorful, but also reusable, making them an environmentally friendly choice for your child's party - use them again and again for future celebrations.

8CT VALUE PACK: With 8 eye-catching, vibrant dinosaur-themed loot bags included in each pack, you'll have enough to surprise and delight all the young guests at your child's event, ensuring they have a roaring good time.
